defs: The act of exposing or laying open, setting forth, laying bare of protection, depriving of care or concealment, or setting out to reprobation or contempt.
quotes: The exposure of Fuller . . . put an end to the practices of that vile tribe.

defs: The state of being exposed or laid open or bare; openness to danger; accessibility to anything that may affect, especially detrimentally; as, exposure to observation, to cold, to inconvenience.
quotes: When we have our naked frailties hid, That suffer in exposure.

defs: Position as to points of compass, or to influences of climate, etc.
quotes: The best exposure of the two for woodcocks.

defs: The exposing of a sensitized plate to the action of light.
